name: brand-voice
tagline: Builds a reusable brand-voice writing profile from real samples for consistent content, outreach, and social copy.
verdict: Solid, well-structured content skill: clear source priority, collection workflow, and a hard-ban list against generic AI tropes. Weak spots: no negative-trigger/scope guard, no versioning signal, and its output format lives entirely in an unverifiable reference file with no inline example.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion language anywhere; lists downstream skills to feed but never says when this skill shouldn't fire.
Sample gathering and X-source access are only conditionally framed ('when available'); no fallback defined if sources are too thin.
VOICE PROFILE output format is deferred entirely to references/voice-profile-schema.md with no inline example shown.
